layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarizes the next cleanup release and the removal planning scope.

layoutRegions.name: batch-queue
layoutRegions.purpose: Shows ranked removal batches with owners, windows, dry-run results, dependencies, and rollback state.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-console
layoutRegions.purpose: Keeps rollback commands, communication windows, and audit packet readiness visible.

components.name: BatchCard
components.purpose: Risk-ranked removal batch summary with stable fact cells.
interactions: stage and risk states stay visible at all widths
facts wrap without resizing adjacent cards

components.name: DependencyRow
components.purpose: Compact entitlement dependency and blocker state for each target system.
interactions: row layout collapses to one column on narrow viewports

components.name: RollbackCommand
components.purpose: Clickable command rows for rollback-ready cleanup batches.
interactions: long commands wrap without horizontal scrolling

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
